{ "name": "vps-pro", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "Advanced Web-based VPS Panel", "main": "server.js", "scripts": { "start": "node server.js" }, "dependencies": { "express": "^4.18.2", "socket.io": "^4.7.2", "node-pty": "^1.0.0" } }

Cron Jobs

Daily Backup

0 2 * * *

/scripts/backup.sh

Health Check

*/5 * * * *

curl -f http://localhost:3000/health

Log Cleanup

0 0 * * 0

find /var/log -name "*.log" -mtime +7 -delete

VNC Desktop Access

Click "Start VNC" to launch a remote desktop session

Note: VNC requires additional server configuration
